name: Emergency Mode flow
description: Test the Emergency Mode feature: user opens the emergency modal, enters a country, and receives emergency contact information

planSteps.description: Click the red 'وضع الطوارئ' (Emergency Mode) button
Verify a modal opens with fields for country and nationality
Click the 'احصل على معلومات الطوارئ' submit button
Wait for the loading state to finish and verify police, ambulance, and fire numbers are displayed
Verify embassy advice, emergency phrases, and a general safety tip are displayed
Click submit with an empty country field
Verify a validation error message appears
